allow: PowerShell(python -c "import inspect, django.db.backends.oracle.base as ob; print\(inspect.getsource\(ob.DatabaseWrapper.__init__\)\)" 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 30)

PowerShell(python -c "import django.db.backends.oracle.base as ob; print\('class attr:', ob.DatabaseWrapper.minimum_database_version\); import inspect; src = inspect.getsource\(ob.DatabaseWrapper\); print\('minimum_database_version in src:', 'minimum_database_version' in src\)" 2>&1)

PowerShell(python -c "import django.db.backends.base.base as bb; import inspect; src = inspect.getsource\(bb.BaseDatabaseWrapper\); lines = [\(i+1, l\) for i, l in enumerate\(src.split\('\\n'\)\) if 'minimum_database_version' in l]; print\('\\n'.join\(f'{ln}: {l}' for ln, l in lines\)\)" 2>&1)
